title: axonopus debilis
intro: Axonopus debilis, also known as Bahama grass or Bahamagrass, is a type of tropical grass native to the Caribbean and southern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Axonopus debilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
